message:
✨ Add hover/click focus mode toggle for terminal tiles (#159)

Add a toolbar toggle (eye icon) that switches between hover-to-focus and
click-to-focus modes for terminal tiles. When hover mode is active, mousing
over a tile automatically focuses that terminal. Click mode (default)
preserves existing behavior. Preference persists to localStorage.

- Add focusMode state with localStorage persistence (key: copilot-remote:focusMode)
- Add EyeIcon toggle button next to tile button (visible only in tile mode)
- Add onMouseEnter handler on tile containers for hover focus
- Add vitest tests for focus mode localStorage logic

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
